nasb.text: He named the second Ephraim, “For,” he said, “God has made me fruitful in the land of my affliction.”

esv.text: The name of the second he called Ephraim, “For God has made me fruitful in the land of my affliction.”

cnv.text: 他給次子起名叫以法蓮，因為他說：“　神使我在受苦之地繁盛起來。”

ccb.text: 约瑟给次子取名叫以法莲，因为他说：“上帝使我在受苦之地昌盛。”

csbs.text: 他给第二个儿子起名为以法莲，因为他说：“神使我在受苦之地繁盛。”
